textPlain: I highly recommend the movie, Born into Brothels [0]. It's set in Sonagachi, in some sense the analogue of Kamathipura in Calcutta.Crumbling concrete congestion aside Sonagachi is quite different. Here sex workers are self organized, have a political voice and are unionised. The latest form of which ishttps://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Durbar_Mahila_Samanwaya_Comm...[0] https://m.imdb.com/title/tt0388789/
